evals.prompt: Create a settings form module called `search_settings` for configuring search parameters on our Drupal 10 Open Social site. The form at `/admin/config/search/search-settings` should have fields for: similarity_threshold (number, default 0.7), result_limit (number, default 5), and cache_ttl (number, default 300). Save all settings to config. Include a config schema file. We want D11 compatibility.
evals.expected_output: ConfigFormBase with getEditableConfigNames, config schema, route with _form key
expectations: Form class implements getEditableConfigNames() returning array with config name
Route YAML uses _form key (not _controller) for the settings route
config/schema/{module}.schema.yml file exists with typed entries
Schema types include integer or float types for numeric fields
The module enables successfully: ddev drush en search_settings returns exit code 0
Settings form renders: navigate to /admin/config/search/search-settings (as admin) and verify form fields are present (page contains 'Similarity' or 'similarity_threshold')
